title: stelis vulgaris
intro: Stelis vulgaris, also known as the "green orchid", is a type of orchid plant native to South America. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Stelis vulgaris contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health issues, including pain, swelling, and infections. The plant's leaves and roots can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
